Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Luminous Queen Sha Miara]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Luminous Queen Sha Miara is a girl of ten or eleven years old with fiery red hair wrapped in glistening peacock feathers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Luminous Queen Sha Miara follows the Path of Celestial Radiance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Luminous Queen Sha Miara can Forge a sword of blinding rainbow light.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Sha Miara is the Queen of the Ninecloud Court.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Luminous Queen Sha Miara is one of the powerful people Lindon saw in his vision.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Sha Miara is a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Sha Miara had a coronation two years prior to the current events.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Sha Miara inherited a Monarch's power at the age of twelve.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Sha Miara is the Luminous Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Sha Miara used royal madra to solve the puzzle box.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Sha Miara is in second place.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Sha Miara claims to be an Underlady from a distant branch of the royal family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Sha Miara is a member of the Ninecloud Court team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Nineclouds put Miara as their team captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Sha Miara is of the Ninecloud Court and a chosen of the Luminous Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Sha Miara is a participant in the arena who was staring at the sky.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Sha Miara had been crowned in the room Lindon recognized.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Sha Miara is a veiled Monarch whose power is restricted to Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Sha Miara is a fighter in the competition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Sha Miara can restrict herself down to the level of an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Sha Miara is restricted to the Underlord stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Sha Miara is a restricted Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Sha Miara materialized in her Monarch platform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — The situation with the Ninecloud Court could be due to Miara’s immaturity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Sha Miara sensed the alarm of the Ninecloud Soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Sha Miara's power provides rainbow light to move citizens to shelter or block stray bursts of power in Ninecloud City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Sha Miara was attempting to contain the destruction in the countryside.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Sha Miara wears a shining mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Sha Miara is sheathed in rainbows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Sha Miara hosted a meeting with the Monarchs.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Sha Miara is an ally of Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Sha Miara is working with Reigan Shen to protect Rosegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Sha Miara was relegated to a support role behind the Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Sha Miara uses a rainbow-light disguise.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Miara possesses royal madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Sha Miara possesses royal madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Sha Miara followed Emriss and was sheathed in rainbow light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Sha Miara has relatives in Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Sha Miara appears as a lump of rainbow madra trembling in terror.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Sha Miara whines about having to leave.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
